identity.description: Understands an uploaded image (base64) and returns a text description using the configured vision provider. Lets OpenClaw process a picture as part of a task by finding a model that can read it.

inputs.description: Base64-encoded image, its container format (png, jpg, jpeg, webp, gif), and an optional prompt to focus the description.

example.prompt: What's in this image? Suggest a caption.

outputs.description: JSON { ok, text } with the model's description of the image.

tags.name: Image to Text
tags.description: Understand an image and return a text description.

tags.name: Image Understanding
tags.description: Analyze the contents of an image.
